content_body:
Looking for family fun in Blue Ridge, GA? While planning a cabin trip in Georgia, be sure to experience The Lilly Pad Village ~ a fun destination for families designed around a beautiful mountain setting with picturesque views and the sounds of nature. 

Finding fun things to do in Blue Ridge with the kids is so easy in the Aska Adventure Area and at The Lilly Pad Village. The Mini Golf Course is designed with hiking in mind, whereas the Gem Mining Flumes are located in a shady mountain setting. Fish in the Lilly Pond, a picturesque 1/3 acre pond, which is stocked with catfish, brim, and bass.

Enjoy a friendly staff, beautiful property, kids and pet-friendly environment, picnic tables, and just an all-round fun destination for your family to spend part of the day.

Stay in our luxury Blue Ridge cabin rental, Aska Escape Lodge, and you are within walking distance of The Lilly Pad Village. A popular family-friendly cabin located in the heart of all this FUN!
title: The Lilly Pad Village
